title: Vijaya Diagnostics is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Vijaya Diagnostics is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!
